welcome.title: Welcome & Goodbye
welcome.desc: Greet new members with custom messages and auto-assign roles.

leveling.title: Leveling System
leveling.desc: Reward active members with XP, levels, and role rewards.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.desc: Auto-mod, ban, kick, mute, warn — keep your server safe.

commands.title: Custom Commands
commands.desc: Create personalized commands with embeds and actions.

roles.title: Role Manager
roles.desc: Create, edit and organize server roles with colors and permissions.

tickets.title: Ticket System
tickets.desc: Professional support tickets for your community.

flow_builder.title: Flow Builder
flow_builder.desc: Visual automation workflows with drag-and-drop — no coding required.

reaction_roles.title: Reaction Roles
reaction_roles.desc: Let members pick their own roles with emoji reactions.

music.title: Music Player
music.desc: Play music from YouTube, Spotify and SoundCloud in voice channels.

voicemaster.title: VoiceMaster
voicemaster.desc: Auto-create temporary voice channels when users join a trigger channel.

embed_builder.title: Embed Builder
embed_builder.desc: Design stunning Discord messages with a visual Components V2 editor.

activity_log.title: Activity Log
activity_log.desc: Comprehensive event logging — surpasses Discord's audit log.

translate.title: Translation Portal
translate.desc: Manage and translate server content into multiple languages.

expression.title: Expression
expression.desc: Manage server emojis, stickers, and soundboard in one place.

channels.title: Channel Manager
channels.desc: Create, edit, delete and organize Discord channels visually.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.desc: Manage webhooks, invites, and external channel connections.
